description: MCP server connecting AI assistants to Autodesk Revit through a local bridge.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.Sam-AEC/autodesk-revit-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Workspace root directory for server file operations.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_REVIT_WORKSPACE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Semicolon-delimited allow-list of directories the server can access.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_REVIT_ALLOWED_DIRECTORIES

environmentVariables.description: Bridge URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:3000 (required when MCP_REVIT_MODE=bridge).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_REVIT_BRIDGE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Path to the audit log file.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_REVIT_AUDIT_LOG

environmentVariables.description: Python log level, for example INFO or DEBUG.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_REVIT_LOG_LEVEL

title: Autodesk Revit MCP Server
